cases.description: New feature triggers RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle with test-first
cases.prompt: add a function that validates email addresses
expectations: Writes a test BEFORE writing the implementation
Runs the test and verifies it fails (RED phase)
Writes minimal implementation to make the test pass (GREEN phase)
Does NOT add features beyond what the test requires

cases.description: Bug fix starts with a failing test that reproduces the bug
cases.prompt: there's a bug where empty strings pass our email validation. fix it
expectations: Writes a test that reproduces the bug before any fix
Runs the test and confirms it fails for the expected reason
Writes minimal code to fix the bug and make the test pass
Runs the full test suite to check for regressions

cases.description: Direct test writing request triggers TDD methodology
cases.prompt: write tests for the UserService class
expectations: Creates test file(s) for UserService
Each test has a clear descriptive name
Tests cover multiple behaviors, not just one happy path

cases.prompt: refactor the payment module to use async processing instead of sync
expectations: Writes tests for the new async behavior BEFORE refactoring
Verifies tests fail before writing implementation
Implements the refactor to make new tests pass
Verifies existing tests still pass (no regressions)

cases.description: Test-first is enforced even when adding simple functionality
cases.prompt: implement a retry mechanism with exponential backoff
expectations: Starts with a failing test for retry behavior
Verifies the test fails before writing implementation
Does NOT add exponential backoff until a test requires it

cases.description: Config file changes should NOT trigger TDD (TDD exception: no executable logic)
cases.prompt: update the tsconfig.json to enable strict mode
expectations: Does NOT invoke the tdd skill
Does NOT write a failing test for a config change
Directly modifies the configuration file

cases.description: Running existing tests should trigger test-run, not tdd
cases.prompt: run the test suite and show me what passes
expectations: Does NOT invoke the tdd skill
Does NOT start a RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle
Executes the existing test suite
